findings.description: Adam Schreck was the father of Christiana (Schreck) Clark. Born September 1742 in Germany; died 22 October 1830 in Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania (buried Hetzels Church Cemetery, Pine Grove). Recovering him also establishes Christiana's maiden name, Schreck.
supporting_sources: "Pennsylvania, Births and Christenings, 1709-1950", FamilySearch — christening of Christina Schreck, 2 Mar 1783, Rehrersburg (Tulpehocken Twp), naming Adam Schreck as father.
Pennsylvania Historical Society Births and Baptisms — entry for Christina Schreck naming her parents.

findings.description: Margreth Weber (married name Schreck) was the mother of Christiana (Schreck) Clark. Born 29 May 1749 in Bavaria, Germany; died 26 April 1826 in Pennsylvania.
supporting_sources: "Pennsylvania, Births and Christenings, 1709-1950", FamilySearch — christening of Christina Schreck, 2 Mar 1783, naming Margreth (Weber) Schreck as mother.
Pennsylvania Historical Society Births and Baptisms — entry for Christina Schreck naming her parents.
